Latest News All Posts Health and Social Care Crime and Justice Social Security Education and Young People Local Community Housing and Planning Environment Economy Transport Ask Anna Speeches and Questions Road Safety Anna Dixon MP welcomes news thousands of unpaid carers are set to have debts cut or cancelled Anna Dixon MP has today strongly welcomed the news that tens of thousands of unpaid carers affected by confusing guidance on their earnings are set to have their debts reduced, cancelled, or refunded, as part of a major reassessment of cases launched by the government. Apr 13 Clean river campaigners and Anna Dixon continue campaign against local river pollution in Parliament Members of the Ilkley Clean River Group and Shipley MP Anna Dixon joined forces again in Parliament on Tuesday to continue their campaign for large-scale reform of the water industry. Mar 19 Anna Dixon MP announces upgrades to Windhill play park Anna Dixon MP for Shipley, has today announced that she will be working closely with Bradford Council leaders to deliver much-needed improvements to a Windhill play park. Mar 16 Key Energy Minister visits Saltaire to see innovative local listed homes upgrade project A key government energy minister visited the Saltaire World Heritage Site on Thursday to meet with residents and learn how local organisations are retrofitting listed homes to enhance their energy efficiency.
